LightningComponentBundle.description: Continuing Education study offering header with register button.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: REDU Continuing Edu - Offering Record Header

property.name: titleFieldApiName
property.label: Title Field Name
property.description: Enter a Text field API name e.g. Name, this will display the value as title of the Study Offering header.

property.name: imageFieldApiName
property.label: Image Field Name
property.description: Field api name for the header image, add image of resolution 1880 x 400 pixels.

property.name: detailShowTitle
property.label: Show Title
property.description: Show title for the details.

property.name: detailTitle
property.label: Header for Detail
property.description: Enter a value to display as title to define unit related information e.g. Registration details, registration detail values from the record will be shown below this.

property.name: detailShowIcon
property.label: Show Icon
property.description: Show icon for the title.

property.name: detailIconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: To display an icon for the details displayed enter the salesforce utlity icon name e.g. utility:weeklyview

property.name: detailFieldNames
property.label: Field Names
property.description: Add semicolon seperated field API name to display details for an object.

property.name: detailShowFieldLabel
property.label: Show Field Label
property.description: Check box on the component, if true then the field label on the fields to be visible

property.name: backButtonLabel
property.label: Back to Filtering List Button Label
property.description: Enter the value which will be displayed as label of back to list button.

property.name: backButtonSitePageName
property.label: Back To Site Page Name
property.description: Enter the name of the site page which is used for redirecting back to the origin page.

property.name: allowGuestRegistrationFieldApiName
property.label: Allow Guest Registrations Field Name
property.description: To enter the Api name of Allow Guest Registrations Checkbox

property.name: guestRegistrationText
property.label: Guest Registration Text
property.description: To enter guest registrations text.

property.name: nonGuestRegistrationText
property.label: Non-guest Registration Text
property.description: To enter non-guest registrations text

property.name: guestRegistrationButtonLabel
property.label: Guest Registration Button Text
property.description: To enter guest registrations button text.

property.name: nonGuestRegistrationButtonLabel
property.label: Non Guest Registration Button Text
property.description: To enter non-guest registrations button text

property.name: registrationUrl
property.label: Registration URL
property.description: To enter the redirect url for registration. You can specify the {!recordId} to have the current record id appended to the url e.g, /registration/id={!recordId}.

property.name: registerButtonLabel
property.label: Register Now Button Label
property.description: Enter the value which will be displayed as label of register now button

property.name: registerButtonConditionFieldApiName
property.label: Register Button Condition Field Name
property.description: This field will be used to enable or disable registration button. If it is set to true then registration button will be disabled and if false then registration button will be enabled.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object Name
property.description: Automatically bind the page's object name to the component variable

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: titleFieldApiName
property.label: Title Field Name
property.description: Enter a Text field API name e.g. Name, this will display the value as title of the Study Offering header.

property.name: imageFieldApiName
property.label: Image Field Name
property.description: Field api name for the header image, add image of resolution 1880 x 400 pixels.

property.name: detailShowTitle
property.label: Show Title
property.description: Show title for the details.

property.name: detailTitle
property.label: Header for Detail
property.description: Enter a value to display as title to define unit related information e.g. Registration details, registration detail values from the record will be shown below this.

property.name: detailShowIcon
property.label: Show Icon
property.description: Show icon for the title.

property.name: detailIconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: To display an icon for the details displayed enter the salesforce utlity icon name e.g. utility:weeklyview

property.name: detailFieldNames
property.label: Field Names
property.description: Add semicolon seperated field API name to display details for an object.

property.name: detailShowFieldLabel
property.label: Show Field Label
property.description: Check box on the component, if true then the field label on the fields to be visible

property.name: backButtonLabel
property.label: Back to Filtering List Button Label
property.description: Enter the value which will be displayed as label of back to list button.

property.name: backButtonSitePageName
property.label: Back To Site Page Name
property.description: Enter the name of the site page which is used for redirecting back to the origin page.

property.name: allowGuestRegistrationFieldApiName
property.label: Allow Guest Registrations Field Name
property.description: To enter the Api name of Allow Guest Registrations Checkbox

property.name: guestRegistrationText
property.label: Guest Registration Text
property.description: To enter guest registrations text.

property.name: nonGuestRegistrationText
property.label: Non-guest Registration Text
property.description: To enter non-guest registrations text

property.name: guestRegistrationButtonLabel
property.label: Guest Registration Button Text
property.description: To enter guest registrations button text.

property.name: nonGuestRegistrationButtonLabel
property.label: Non Guest Registration Button Text
property.description: To enter non-guest registrations button text

property.name: registrationUrl
property.label: Registration URL
property.description: To enter the redirect url for registration. You can specify the {!recordId} to have the current record id appended to the url e.g, /registration/id={!recordId}.

property.name: registerButtonLabel
property.label: Register Now Button Label
property.description: Enter the value which will be displayed as label of register now button

property.name: registerButtonConditionFieldApiName
property.label: Register Button Condition Field Name
property.description: This field will be used to enable or disable registration button. If it is set to true then registration button will be disabled and if false then registration button will be enabled.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
